name: Testimonial Avatar Peek Carousel
description: Editorial testimonial carousel: one hero pull-quote at a time, with an avatar strip below that 'peeks' all participants. The active avatar is larger and primary-ringed; clicking any avatar cross-fades the matching quote.

descriptions.descriptive: Center-stage blockquote with a serif open-quote glyph cross-fades on author change. Below a hairline rule, an avatar strip of 3-7 round portraits shows the cast — active avatar is 80px and primary-ringed, the rest sit at 56-64px and 65% opacity. Auto-advances every 7s by default, pauses on hover, and supports left/right keyboard navigation.
descriptions.usage: Use when you have 3-7 high-quality testimonials and want a premium-feeling rotation rather than a wall of cards or a generic dot-paginated carousel. Sits well after a hero or before a closing FAQ; do not stack with other testimonial sections on the same page.
descriptions.audienceFit: Premium B2B SaaS, agencies, professional services, and editorial-leaning brand pages whose social proof reads better as a curated rotation than as a wall of cards.
